package rulefixtures

// scenario for strconv_repeat_on_same_binding: The same string binding is converted with strconv parsing helpers multiple times in one function.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule367NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario367Negative(records []Rule367NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
